name: Restorative & Relaxation
description: Slow, supported sequences to wind down and release tension.

sequences.name: Evening Unwind
sequences.summary: A calming pre-sleep flow of gentle forward folds and rest.

steps.title: Seated Forward Fold
steps.instruction: Sit with legs extended, hinge from the hips, and reach toward your feet. Keep the spine long.

steps.title: Reclined Twist
steps.instruction: Lie on your back, draw one knee across your body, and let it rest. Gaze the opposite way. Switch sides.

steps.title: Legs-Up Rest
steps.instruction: Rest your legs up against a wall or sofa, arms relaxed, and breathe slowly.

sequences.name: Lower-Back Release
sequences.summary: Knee hugs and gentle rocking to ease a tight lower back.

steps.title: Knees to Chest
steps.instruction: On your back, hug both knees in and gently rock side to side.

steps.title: Supported Bridge
steps.instruction: Lift the hips and slide a cushion under them; rest your weight onto it.

steps.title: Corpse Pose
steps.instruction: Release everything and lie flat for a few slow breaths to finish.
